title: Good RED-method dashboard with layered drill-down
code_snippet:
# Grafana Dashboard: Order Service
# Variables: $namespace, $service, $instance
# Row 1: Golden signals (stat panels) — request rate, error rate, p99 latency, uptime
# Row 2: Request rate by endpoint (time series)
# Row 3: Error rate by status code (time series)
# Row 4: Latency heatmap (distribution)
# Row 5: Infrastructure — CPU, memory, goroutines
# Row 6: Dependencies — DB latency, Redis, Kafka consumer lag
# All queries use $namespace and $service variables
# No high-cardinality labels (user_id, trace_id) in any query
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements RED-method dashboard: (1) golden signals overview row for at-a-glance health, (2) drill-down rows by endpoint and status code, (3) latency heatmap showing distribution (not just percentile), (4) infrastructure and dependency panels for root cause diagnosis, (5) variable templating for multi-instance reuse, (6) no high-cardinality labels in queries.
